Declares a namespace package using `pkg_resources`.

# Purpose
This code is a namespace package declaration using the `pkg_resources` module from the `setuptools` library. It allows the package to be split across multiple directories or distributions, enabling different parts of the package to be installed separately. The `declare_namespace` function is called with `__name__`, which refers to the current package's name, to indicate that it is a namespace package. This is useful for organizing large projects or for allowing third-party extensions to add functionality to a package. The code does not contain any other functionality or logic beyond this declaration.
